conditioning: all suffixes vowel-harmonise; possessive stacks after the plural and before case (ev-ler-im-de)

examples: possessor agreement is unmarked in the English pivot
fit_none.note: the plural -lAr projects cleanly (English Plural feature); possessor agreement (-Im/-In/-(s)I) has no English correlate, so a pivot-based detector recovers the plural but not the possessive — the expected gap (same shape as voice: only the English-markable half)

prose: tur has suffixal NUMBER (plural -lAr, harmonic) and POSSESSIVE agreement (-Im/-In/-(s)I). The plural is recovered from data (predicts the English Plural feature); the possessive is unmarked in English and so is not recoverable from the pivot — the same only-the-markable-half pattern seen in voice. Recommendation: PROMOTE plural -lAr; flag possessive agreement as needing a vernacular-internal signal.
